subcodes.first_line: O ye who are enkindled with the fire of God's love! When His Holiness Moses, peace be upon Him, hastened unto the Valley of Ayman, He beheld the flame of the Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبسان نار محبت الله حضرت موسی علیه السلام چون بوادی ایمن شتافت شعله طور دید
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
